ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., URL, file path) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "run_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each run (run_uuid) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., succeeded, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., mse, mae, rmse, r2_score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number within the run */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., mse, mae, rmse, r2_score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric type (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model trainer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_run_users" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the model run (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing_data" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "prediction_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., probability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "prediction_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics_over_time" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_name", "timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_over_time_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "hyperparameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_feature_importances" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_explanations" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "explanation_name" TEXT /* Name of the explanation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the explanation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "explanation_name")
)
